---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Cooperation

When work spans several components, describe the ownership boundary before editing and keep changes aligned with the smallest reviewable unit.

When a request is too broad for one safe change, try to split it together with the user before modifying unrelated areas.

When information is missing, state the assumption and continue only when the assumption is low risk.

Prefer concise progress updates that mention the files or subsystems being changed.

Do not hide failed validation; report the command, the failure, and the narrow next step.
